Company: The name of the company providing the diabetes management program.
Program Year: The year the diabetes management program was carried out.
Average HbA1c Reduction (%): The average percentage reduction in HbA1c among participants in the program.
Participants Meeting Goals (%): The percentage of participants that met treatment goals through the program.
Program Effectiveness Comment: Any comments or notes on the program's effectiveness and its relation to regulatory compliance risks.
The program was successful, but needs to focus on further reducing HbA1c.

The program maintained its effectiveness in reducing HbA1c and meeting treatment goals.
The program was effective in reducing HbA1c and meeting treatment goals.

This data is not relevant because clinical effectiveness validates program quality, but doesn't address regulatory compliance risks. MediConn cannot use this data to determine what strategic adjustments are needed for provincial CHA variations or billing compliance. This data is related to clinical program performance, with no effect on the regulatory risk mitigation.
